doc_title: Fine-Tuning LLaMA for Multi-Stage Text Retrieval

items.fact: LLaMA: Open and efficient foundation language models
items.evidence_span: Hugo Touvron, Thibaut Lavril, Gautier Izacard, Xavier Martinet, Marie-Anne Lachaux, Timothée Lacroix, Baptiste Rozière, Naman Goyal, Eric Hambro, Faisal Azhar, Aurelien Rodriguez, Armand Joulin, Edouard Grave, and Guillaume Lample. 2023a.
